div.p:
Prometheus Metrics ──────────────────── • batch_size: histogram • batch_wait_time: histogram
• queue_depth: gauge • inference_latency: histogram

ul.li: -▶ Async resolution ⏵ Animated = active data Key Constraints: • max_batch_size: 32 • max_wait_time: 10ms • queue.maxsize: 1000

div.p: for i, result in enumerate(outputs): future = pending_futures[i] future.set_result(result) metrics.observe_duration()
